---
name: Bug report
about: Something in the agents or docs doesn't work as described
title: "[bug] "
labels: bug
---

**What happened?**
A clear description of the problem.

**Which part?**
- [ ] An agent (analyst / experiment-designer / historian)
- [ ] The docs / README / cheat sheet
- [ ] The templates or the example
- [ ] Something else

**Steps to reproduce**
What did you type or do?

**What did you expect instead?**

**Your setup**
Which model or tool are you using (Claude Code, ChatGPT, Gemini, a local model, …)?

> ⚠️ Please don't paste real personal data from your own model. Redact it or use a made-up example.
